definitions: 全能的；有无上权力的；力量极强的

examples.text: Desperate, the Jade Emperor called on the only being stronger than he, the supreme power in all the heavens: the Buddha himself. Even in the face of this almighty opponent, Sun Wukong was not one to grovel. He began boasting of his many talents and demanded the Emperor's crown.
examples.explanation: 这里 almighty 修饰 opponent，表示“力量无比强大、几乎全能的对手”，强调佛祖是孙悟空面对的极强敌手。

source.text: The tale of the Monkey King and the Buddha - Ji Hao
